title: oldenlandia corymbosa var. corymbosa
intro: Oldenlandia corymbosa var. corymbosa, also known as 'small-flowered oldenlandia' or ' Chinese ephedra', is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its alkaloid content, particularly ephedrine, which is used to treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Oldenlandia corymbosa var. corymbosa include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
